channel.title: Apify Actor Powerhouse
channel.description: Public workflow hub updates for Apify Actor business workflows.

item.title: Business workflows from Apify Actors
item.description: Public hub for AI visibility, review intelligence, supplier intelligence, and hiring-signal workflows.

item.title: Use cases by buyer job
item.description: Search-focused entry points for recurring business workflows built on Apify Actors.

item.title: Workflow blueprints
item.description: Platform-neutral JSON blueprints for weekly AI visibility, review intelligence, supplier shortlist, and job-board account-signal jobs.

item.title: Workflow feedback
item.description: Public-safe issue forms for sample requests, first-run friction, and workflow variants.

item.title: GEO Client Reporting Workflow
item.description: A first-run workflow for SEO and GEO agencies that need repeatable AI visibility scorecards, competitor mentions, and client-ready reporting.

item.title: AI Answer Competitor Gap Workflow
item.description: A first-run workflow for B2B SaaS content teams and GEO agencies that need to turn competitor mentions in AI answers into specific publishing actions.

item.title: AI Search Visibility Monitoring
item.description: A small Apify workflow for B2B SaaS marketing teams that need to monitor AI answer mentions, competitor presence, citation gaps, and publishing actions.

item.title: Review Scraper Action Queue
item.description: A first-run workflow for teams already collecting public reviews with Apify scrapers and needing theme tags, response priorities, proof quotes, and owner-ready follow-up rows.

item.title: Local Review Response Queue
item.description: A first-run workflow for local SEO agencies and reputation managers that need review themes, owner-response drafts, proof quotes, and client-report actions.

item.title: Marketplace Review Action Queue
item.description: A first-run workflow for ecommerce teams and agencies that need to turn Amazon reviews into quality fixes, listing improvements, seller-response tasks, and proof quotes.

item.title: Competitor Review Battlecards
item.description: A first-run workflow for product marketing and sales enablement teams that need competitor objections, proof quotes, switching-risk themes, and fresh battlecard rows.

item.title: Review Proof Quote Mining
item.description: A first-run workflow for marketers and agencies that need to turn public reviews into reusable proof quotes, objection language, and weekly content actions.

item.title: Supplier Shortlist Intelligence
item.description: A first-run workflow for sourcing teams that need to score supplier profiles, spot capability gaps, and decide which records deserve outreach or verification.

item.title: Job Board Account Signals
item.description: A first-run workflow for sales and RevOps teams that need to turn public hiring data into account actions, department signals, seniority clues, and weekly CRM updates.

item.title: Amazon Review Scraper to Action Workflow
item.description: A buyer-facing workflow for teams that already collect Amazon reviews and need the next step: themes, urgency, proof quotes, and response or listing actions.

item.title: Google Maps Review Scraper Response Workflow
item.description: A workflow page for local SEO and reputation teams that collect Google Maps reviews but still need prioritized responses, proof quotes, and client-report bullets.

item.title: G2 Review Scraper Battlecard Workflow
item.description: A workflow page for product marketing and sales enablement teams that need review-backed objections, proof quotes, and talk tracks after a G2 export.

item.title: Job Scraper to Account Signals Workflow
item.description: A workflow page for teams that monitor public job posts and need GTM actions: expansion signals, department investment, seniority, and account follow-up priority.

item.title: Supplier Scraper to Shortlist Workflow
item.description: A workflow page for procurement and sourcing teams that collect supplier records and need capability, risk, and opportunity scoring before outreach.

item.title: AI Brand Visibility Monitor - GEO & AI Search Tracker
item.description: AI visibility Actor for SEO agencies, GEO/AEO consultants, brand marketers, B2B SaaS marketing teams.

item.title: AI Visibility Report Generator
item.description: AI visibility Actor for Agencies, GEO/AEO consultants, client-facing marketing teams.

item.title: Google Maps Review Intelligence Monitor
item.description: Review intelligence Actor for Local SEO agencies, reputation managers, franchises, multi-location operators.

item.title: Trustpilot Review Intelligence Monitor
item.description: Review intelligence Actor for Brand marketers, reputation managers, ecommerce operators, support leaders.

item.title: Amazon Review Intelligence Monitor
item.description: Review intelligence Actor for Ecommerce sellers, marketplace operators, agencies, product teams.

item.title: G2 Review Battlecard Monitor
item.description: Review intelligence Actor for Product marketing, sales enablement, competitive intelligence teams, RevOps.

item.title: Capterra Review Battlecard Monitor
item.description: Review intelligence Actor for Product marketing, sales enablement, competitive intelligence teams, agencies.

item.title: Local Review Intelligence Monitor
item.description: Review intelligence Actor for Local SEO agencies, reputation managers, franchises, multi-location operators.

item.title: B2B Competitor Review Battlecard Monitor
item.description: Review intelligence Actor for B2B SaaS product marketing, sales enablement, RevOps, agencies.

item.title: Supplier Intelligence Monitor
item.description: Supplier intelligence Actor for Procurement teams, importers, Amazon sellers, industrial sales teams, sourcing agencies.

item.title: Public Hiring Signal Monitor
item.description: Hiring signals Actor for Sales teams, RevOps, recruiters, agencies, ABM teams.

item.description: Compare buyer workflow fit for AI visibility report generator tools.
